title: rungia latior var. hirsuta
intro: Rungia latior var. hirsuta, also known as Hairy Rungia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Rungia latior var. hirsuta include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
